layoutRegions.name: masthead
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize the risky session review and expose the revocation staging action.

layoutRegions.name: session-timeline
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect risky sign-in sessions, impossible travel evidence, token age, and containment state.

layoutRegions.name: evidence-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare token replay clues, device pivots, owner intent, and investigation status.

layoutRegions.name: revocation-plans
layoutRegions.purpose: Stage rollback-safe session revocation and containment plans.

components.name: SessionCard
components.purpose: Shows one risky session with app, impossible-travel evidence, token clue, and contained, investigate, or revoke state.
interactions: state is visible through tokenized border color
card content stays stable across responsive breakpoints

components.name: DevicePivotRow
components.purpose: Compares device pivot evidence, affected user, owner intent, and containment status.
interactions: grid collapses without hiding any signal

components.name: RevocationPlanCard
components.purpose: Captures revocation action, containment impact, and rollback-safe recovery path.
interactions: rollback note remains visible at narrow widths

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
